title: Los desarraigados
writer: Gilberto Gazcón, Humberto Robles Arenas, Raúl de Anda
actors: Pedro Armendáriz, Ariadne Welter, Agustín de Anda
plot: A Mexican lady driving into the U.S., finds herself stranded in a town near the border and is aided by a friendly Mexican American family. Soon she experiences the family struggles due to the clash of cultures and the generation gap.
